description: Registry of all custom SQL blocks that cannot be expressed in Drizzle ORM schema language

CSQL-001.purpose: Convert audit_trail to partitioned table by quarter
CSQL-001.justification: Drizzle ORM does not support PARTITION BY RANGE syntax. Required for scalability and partition pruning.
CSQL-001.rollback: DROP TABLE audit.audit_trail CASCADE; Recreate as regular table

CSQL-002.purpose: Create quarterly partitions for audit_trail (2026 Q1-Q4, 2027 Q1)
CSQL-002.justification: Partition creation requires explicit CREATE TABLE ... PARTITION OF syntax
CSQL-002.rollback: DROP TABLE audit.audit_trail_2026_q1; (repeat for each partition)

CSQL-003.purpose: Create GIN indexes on JSONB columns (old_data, new_data, client_info)
CSQL-003.justification: Drizzle supports GIN indexes but not jsonb_path_ops operator class for optimized containment queries
CSQL-003.rollback: DROP INDEX audit.idx_audit_old_data_gin; (repeat for each index)

CSQL-004.justification: Stored procedures cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema language

CSQL-005.justification: Trigger functions require PL/pgSQL which Drizzle cannot express

CSQL-006.purpose: Attach audit trigger to hr.employees table
CSQL-006.justification: Trigger attachments cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema

CSQL-007.justification: Immutability enforcement requires BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE trigger

CSQL-008.justification: Complex tenant isolation logic requires PL/pgSQL trigger function

CSQL-009.purpose: Attach tenant isolation trigger to core.organizations table
CSQL-009.justification: Trigger attachments cannot be expressed in Drizzle schema
